chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Misc: Application No.S-596 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For order on office objection (s) 2. For hearing of main case 06.11.2025 Ms.Safa Hisbani, A.P.G **** None present on behalf of the applicant. No intimation has been received. The applicant Mst. Suria wife of Muhammad Fayaz, is aggrieved by the Order dated 25.08.2025, passed by the I-Additional Sessions Judge/Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Hyderabad. She contends that following her marriage with Muhammad Fayaz son of Muhammad Bachal Mahar, solemnised on 19.04.2025, the proposed accused No.1, her former husband Abdul Rahim son of Abdul Aziz has allegedly committed certain criminal offences, as stated in her Criminal Miscellaneous Application No.4778/2025. However, the learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace did not take those allegations into consideration and granted her police protection only. I have perused the documents available on record and do not find any information which may trigger relief to the applicant under Section 22- A(i) and (iii) Cr.P.C. Accordingly there is no defect in the impugned Order dated 25.08.2025. The direction issued by the Ex-Officio Justice of Peace to the police authorities to provide the applicant legal protection in accordance with law is sustained. Accordingly, this Criminal Miscellaneous Application stands dismissed in the above terms. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
